allow: PowerShell($gh = \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \($gh\) { Write-Host "gh found: $gh" } else { Write-Host "gh not in PATH" }; if \($gh\) { & $gh --version })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Damaris200/AgroSense_AI/contributors" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="Damaris200"; "Accept"="application/vnd.github+json"}; $r | Select-Object login, contributions | Format-Table } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Damaris200/AgroSense_AI/pulls/7/commits" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="Damaris200"; "Accept"="application/vnd.github+json"}; $r | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ sha = $_.sha.Substring\(0,8\); author = $_.commit.author.name; coauthors = \($_.commit.message -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "Co-authored-by" }\) -join "; " } } | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell($h = @{"User-Agent"="Damaris200"; "Accept"="application/vnd.github+json"}; Write-Host "=== Contributors API ==="; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Damaris200/AgroSense_AI/contributors" -Headers $h\) | Select-Object login, id, contributions | Format-Table } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" }; Write-Host "=== Contributors API \(anon=true to include all\) ==="; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Damaris200/AgroSense_AI/contributors?anon=true" -Headers $h\) | Select-Object login, name, email, contributions | Format-Table } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" }; Write-Host "=== Collaborators ==="; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Damaris200/AgroSense_AI/collaborators" -Headers $h\) | Select-Object login | Format-Table } catch { Write-Host "ERROR \(likely needs auth\): $_" })

PowerShell($h = @{"User-Agent"="Damaris200"; "Accept"="application/vnd.github+json"}; Write-Host "=== Search GitHub user 'claude' ==="; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/users/claude" -Headers $h\) | Select-Object login, id, html_url, created_at | Format-List } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" }; Write-Host "=== Recent commits on main with co-author or unusual author ==="; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Damaris200/AgroSense_AI/commits?per_page=10" -Headers $h\) | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ sha=$_.sha.Substring\(0,8\); author=$_.commit.author.email; login=\($_.author.login -as [string]\); has_claude=\($_.commit.message -match "claude" -or $_.commit.message -match "anthropic"\) } } | Format-Table -AutoSize } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })
